mapper.sql: id, follower_user_id, following_user_id, created_at, updated_at, deleted_at, version
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_user_follow WHERE following_user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM blog_user_follow WHERE follower_user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT following_user_id FROM blog_user_follow WHERE follower_user_id = #{followerUserId} AND deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY created_at DESC, id DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE blog_user_follow SET deleted_at = #{deletedAt}, updated_at = #{updatedAt}, version = version + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
